description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish MISC Packages that publishes various packages (MSI, MATLAB, XCFramework, Swift, Brew) to S3. The workflow can be triggered manually with a channel and run ID, or called by another workflow with the same inputs. It uses separate jobs for each package type, each running on ubuntu-24.04 or macos-15, downloading artifacts from a previous workflow run, and uploading them to S3.
